text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's a new year, and T.M. Opera O<n>finds herself in
a completely new<n>situation.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Look at Meisho Doto! A second place<n>finish!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's steadily built herself up from a<n>no-name
newcomer to now proving<n>herself capable of the
graded races!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff... I... made it... somehow... I'mgetting there, little by little.
Oh, oh! Look at the TV, Trainer! It'sDoto! Our Doto!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Any moment now, I guarantee she'll<n>come
through that door to thank me<n>for all I've done to
spur her growth!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: OPERA OOOOO!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What did I say? Now, Doto, shower<n>me with
grateful adoration!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um... I do feel grateful, but there's<n>something more
important right now.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A press conference is about to start...<n>Special
Week, Grass Wonder, and El<n>Condor Pasa are all
there.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What? The older generation's three<n>musketeers
are speaking to the<n>press?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming, everybody! We<n>have
something important to say!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The three of us, myself, Grass<n>Wonder, and El
Condor Pasa...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: ...won't be running in next year's<n>Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Whaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean you're bowing out<n>after this
year?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No, we feel we have accomplished all<n>we can at
this level and wish to<n>compete in the Dream
Trophy<n>League.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ciao, everybody! Wait, is this<n>goodbye?! Will we
ever see each<n>other again?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El, we aren't quitting. Don't give<n>them the wrong
idea.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
So, three stalwarts of the Twinkle<n>Series are
moving on to the next<n>league.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
What does this mean for next year? I<n>hope it
doesn't start a downward<n>spiral...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Kgh! Argh, grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How can those three be advancing to<n>the next
stage? Ahh, that's not even<n>their most
unforgivable<n>transgression...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
They've stolen my spotlight! Even<n>though we're
all seniors!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My kingdom is in ruins... I must<n>reclaim my seat as
the main actor.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, start preparations<n>immediately. I'll be
having a press<n>conference of my own!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What about? Ha ha ha! Did you<n>expect me to
know?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I'll be figuring that out right now, of<n>course.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? But if we don't have an<n>idea... Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Reluctantly, I schedule a press<n>conference for
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Attention, all adoring fans of<n>Umamusume!
Honorable members of<n>the press! You have
recently been<n>made aware of the departure of
three<n>certain persons.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But a year remains until then. New<n>royalty must
therefore be crowned in<n>the interim.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: So, who will inherit their throne? Who,<n>I say?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to provide the answer! It<n>will be none
other than me, T.M.<n>Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: For I am the Overlord! Haaah haha!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: O-okay...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O's logic doesn't add up, but<n>her
overwhelming enthusiasm holds<n>everyone's
attention.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I swear, here and now, that over the<n>next year I
will build a track record<n>befitting the ruler of the
next age.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Tenno Sho, the Japan Cup, and<n>the Arima
Kinen—I shall conquer every<n>G1 race and build my
dynasty!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The chaotic age of vying competitors<n>is at an end.
A singular king shall<n>unite the realm under one
throne.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, the curtain has risen to reveal<n>my reign! This
is no sunset, but the<n>dawn of an era!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Witness the birth of a new ruler!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ooohhh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her bold declaration is met with oohs<n>and aahs
from the audience. After<n>entering her senior year,
it seems her<n>skills in stage performance have
improved too.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is... amazing. I mean, she<n>could cheer up
Ayabe before, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Now she's even more amazing...She made everyone go "wow"...Uuungh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I wish she'd see me as someone to<n>compete
with. I've grown stronger<n>too...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I don't have the courage though... I<n>can't tell her, I
just can't...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, once I have successfully taken<n>my place at
the top...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series will know peace<n>as a
flourishing kingdom for a<n>millennium to come!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
So you see, the three heroes bidding<n>farewell are
already irrelevant.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Usher them out the door with a<n>goodbye and
adieu! Aaaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Someone here's lookin' for trouble,<n>huh? Well,
she's definitely found it!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass, so long as we're around, we<n>can't let her
win!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, yes. She'll soon realize who<n>she's really
up against.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right, I've got some trainin' to do!<n>Nos vemos!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It seems El hasn't realized yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I understand the real reason you held<n>this press
conference, Opera O...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Though you might not have been<n>aware of it
yourself, it was for the<n>sake of the disheartened
fans.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But thank you. I'm glad the younger<n>generation
has you among their<n>ranks.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, my declaration is complete,<n>Trainer! The
starring role is mine once<n>again.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have crossed the Rubicon! All that<n>remains is to
run my way to<n>becoming the Centurial Overlord by
the end of this year! Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A sudden announcement from three<n>popular
Umamusume threatened to<n>take the wind out of
the Twinkle<n>Series' sails...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But T.M. Opera O's declaration<n>instantly breathed
new life into them.<n>A year of pulse-pounding races
between the generations await!
